failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS profile_id,
  p.full_name,
  AVG(c.num_likes) AS avg_comment_likes
FROM profile p
JOIN publication pub ON p.id = pub.profile_id
JOIN comment c ON pub.id = c.publication_id
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'restaurant')
GROUP BY p.id, p.full_name
ORDER BY avg_comment_likes DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error: Query executed successfully but returned 0 rows — the filter may be too restrictive. Consider: OR instead of AND between separate concepts, dropping an overly specific constraint, or a broader tsquery.

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS profile_id,
  p.username,
  p.full_name,
  COUNT(c.id) AS num_comments,
  AVG(c.num_likes) AS avg_comment_likes
FROM profile p
JOIN publication pub ON p.id = pub.profile_id
JOIN comment c ON pub.id = c.publication_id
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'restaurant | food | dining | bistro | cafe | kitchen')
   OR p.full_name ILIKE '%restaurant%'
   OR p.full_name ILIKE '%bistro%'
   OR p.full_name ILIKE '%cafe%'
   OR p.full_name ILIKE '%kitchen%'
GROUP BY p.id
HAVING COUNT(c.id) > 2
ORDER BY avg_comment_likes DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error: Query executed successfully but returned 0 rows — the filter may be too restrictive. Consider: OR instead of AND between separate concepts, dropping an overly specific constraint, or a broader tsquery.

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
  p.id AS profile_id,
  p.username,
  p.full_name,
  COUNT(c.id) AS num_comments,
  SUM(c.num_likes) AS total_comment_likes
FROM profile p
JOIN publication pub ON p.id = pub.profile_id
JOIN comment c ON pub.id = c.publication_id
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'restaurant | food | dining | bistro | cafe | kitchen | eatery | gourmet | cooking')
   OR p.full_name ILIKE '%restaurant%'
   OR p.full_name ILIKE '%bistro%'
   OR p.full_name ILIKE '%cafe%'
   OR p.full_name ILIKE '%kitchen%'
   OR p.full_name ILIKE '%eatery%'
   OR p.full_name ILIKE '%gourmet%'
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY total_comment_likes DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 10;

SELECT

  p.username,
  p.full_name,

   OR p.biography ILIKE '%food%'
   OR p.biography ILIKE '%dining%'

   OR p.full_name ILIKE '%eatery%'
